turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I'm calling about Bajaj Allianz insurance. My father is getting admitted tomorrow for a hernia surgery and I want to confirm the cashless process.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we work with Bajaj Allianz. For tomorrow's admission, please ensure you have your father's Bajaj Allianz health card, a valid ID proof, and the doctor's admission advice letter.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: We have all of that. When should we arrive?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please come at least an hour before the scheduled surgery time to complete the TPA registration and pre-authorization formalities. Our TPA desk opens at 8 AM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And how long does the pre-auth take?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bajaj Allianz usually responds within 2 to 4 hours for planned procedures. Our team follows up actively so there are no delays on the day of surgery.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's reassuring. We'll be there by 8 then.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We'll be ready for you. Best wishes for your father's procedure!
